arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford feelings made clear as Bruges bar footage shows Aston Villa takeover
arts.sum: Aston Villa are taking over in Bruges this week, ahead of the Champions League last 16 first leg clash with Club Brugge in Belgium this evening (KO 17:45). Aston Villa take on Club Brugge in the Champions League and Manchester United loanee Marcus Rashford is in line to feature

arts.ttl: Amadou Onana reveals 'frustrating' Aston Villa injury truth
arts.sum: Aston Villa midfielder Amadou Onana has missed nine of the club's last 10 games through injury The Aston Villa midfielder has missed 15 matches in all competitions this season due to different injuries, including the last six having returned in the second half of the 2-0 defeat at Wolves before then being sidelined again.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa quoted £41m transfer fee for defender wanted by Liverpool amid Virgil van Dijk doubt
arts.sum: Koulierakis, who at 21 already has 11 caps for his country, scored twice on his Wolfsburg debut in a Champions League qualifier against Borac Banja Luka back in July. Villa, meanwhile, will revisit their own centre half department again in the summer; Tyrone Mings will move into the final year of his contract, while Axel Disasi's loan spell from Chelsea will end following the culmination of the season.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford trap warning as Aston Villa told to be 'wary' over Man Utd deal
arts.sum: Manchester United star Marcus Rashford has enjoyed a bright start to life with Aston Villa after joining on loan until the end of the season and both clubs have been sent an interesting message Aston Villa have been told to think carefully about signing Marcus Rashford permanently despite being told he can be the "best player in the Premier League ".

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford behaviour proves ex-Man Utd star's theory right as Jadon Sancho backed
arts.sum: A former Manchester United star believes players like Marcus Rashford and Jadon Sancho can't wait to leave Old Trafford due to the immense pressure of being at a high profile club

arts.ttl: Aston Villa interested in bringing player back – Star keen on PL return as price tag emerges
arts.sum: Douglas Luiz has had a disappointing time since leaving Aston Villa in the summer transfer window. He’s failed to establish himself as a regular at Juventus, playing only 795 minutes in all competitions. The Brazilian is currently injured and expected to return later in the month That injury came just when he was starting to The post Aston Villa interested in bringing player back – Star keen on PL return as price tag emerges appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: “Not aggressive enough” – Player picked out as Aston Villa weaknesses listed
arts.sum: Youri Tielemans is being held aloft as a star in Belgium, but one aspect of his game could be exploited by Club Brugge when they take on Aston Villa in the Champions League this week. That’s according to Luc Nilis, who has singled out the Belgian international while discussing Aston Villa’s weaknesses in general to The post “Not aggressive enough” – Player picked out as Aston Villa weaknesses listed appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Player’s quick return at Aston Villa has Unai Emery labelled ‘a specialist in recovering stagnant players’
arts.sum: Marco Asensio’s quick return to form for Aston Villa have the praise being directed back at Unai Emery once again. That’s at least the case in Mundo Deportivo, where they label the Aston Villa coach as a ‘specialist in recovering stagnant players’ as they cover Asensio today. The Spanish midfielder joined Aston Villa on loan The post Player’s quick return at Aston Villa has Unai Emery labelled ‘a specialist in recovering stagnant players’ appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Jack Grealish told to follow Marcus Rashford example after Aston Villa revival
arts.sum: The former Aston Villa captain has struggled for game-time at Manchester City this season - and has been told to leave the Etihad Stadium Indeed Grealish’s brilliance in the Treble winning year of 2023 now seems something of a memory and just as Rashford has thrived after leaving Man Utd and joining Unai Emery at Aston Villa, so too Grealish has been told to find a new club.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa star says he’s a few weeks away from fitness – Gives update on situation
arts.sum: Aston Villa star Amadou Onana has struggled with a hamstring injury on multiple occasions this season. In October, the Belgium international suffered a setback that kept him on the sidelines for over two weeks. He picked up another hamstring injury in January and returned to the pitch in Aston Villa’s 2-0 defeat to Wolverhampton Wanderers The post Aston Villa star says he’s a few weeks away from fitness – Gives update on situation appeared first on Sport Witness.
